sweeps.summary: Filtered sweep of Planet Labs, ICEYE, SpaceX, Rocket Lab, the PL 8-K feed, and Launch Library 2 shipped two ICEYE items (an Iberdrola grid-monitoring pilot and a Canada wildfire-coverage extension); SpaceX and Rocket Lab's own sites did not return fetchable content, and no launch or financial developments in the reviewed window cleared the freshness or notability bar.
